title: payment — product analytics
note: This file declares product-analytics events that the growth::analytics lane emits about THIS MODULE's admin + customer surfaces (payment method attach, capture, dispute management). Payment-lane events themselves (PaymentCaptured / PaymentDisputeLost / etc.) are the module's OWN events fanning out to Wave 5 growth::marketing via #[AsDomainEventMapper] — those are Lane 5, not Lane 4.

events.name: Payment Method Attached
events.description: Customer saved a payment method. brand_bucket is one of: card_major (visa/mc/amex) / card_other / bank / wallet / other.

events.name: Payment Captured
events.description: PRIMARY success signal. Consent tier: essential (financial-audit + business-critical).

events.name: Payment Failed
events.description: error_type: authentication_error / card_error / api_error / idempotency_error / rate_limit_error / validation_error. error_code_bucket is pre-computed (card_declined / insufficient_funds / expired_card / auth_required / provider_down / other).

events.name: Payment 3DS Challenge Completed
events.description: outcome: authenticated / rejected / not_supported / bypassed / abandoned.

events.name: Payment Provider Circuit Breaker Opened
events.description: P1 event. Consent tier: essential (system-health signal).

events.name: Payment Dispute Opened
events.description: P1 for high-value (>$500). Consent tier: essential (financial-audit signal).

events.name: Payment Dispute Accepted
events.description: Merchant chose to refund without fighting. Consent tier: essential (financial signal).

events.name: Payment Reconcile Drift Detected
events.description: Nightly reconciliation found intent state drift. Signal of lost webhook or async delay.

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw amount_cents — always the bucket (0 / 1-999 / 1000-9999 / 10000-99999 / 100000+). Prevents cross-tenant revenue inference from aggregated data.
Analytics NEVER carry customer identifiers (email, phone, name, IP address, device fingerprint). Only tenant_id + provider + bucket properties.

The 'essential' consent tier for Payment Captured + Payment Failed + Payment 3DS Challenge + Payment Dispute Opened + Payment Dispute Accepted + Payment Dispute Won + Payment Dispute Lost + Payment Provider Circuit Breaker Opened + Payment Reconcile Drift Detected is deliberate — payment operations are core business signals + system-health signals; consent tier cannot be opted out.

This file is DISTINCT from the payment-lane events themselves. Payment-lane events (PaymentCaptured domain event → CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent via #[AsDomainEventMapper]) flow through the growth::marketing module's substrate as marketing_events rows. That's Lane 5. This analytics.json is Lane 4 — the growth::analytics feed about the admin + customer experience of the payment surface.
